name: Enertopia Corp.
business: Enertopia Corp. is engaged in lithium exploration at its Nevada claims and holds intellectual property and non-provisional pending patents in the green technology space. The company controls 88 unpatented mineral lode claims in Esmeralda County, Nevada, covering 1,818 acres. It has been granted three patents and has one pending patent related to clean technology.

exposures.sentence: Enertopia is focused on building shareholder value through a combination of our Nevada Lithium claims and intellectual property & patents in the green technology space.
The EMS is a battery monitoring technology that helps to increase the life and health of monitored battery packs.
By cooling the backside of the PV panels below the dew point the atmospheric moisture condenses on the back side of the panel and drips as rain into the tray collecting the water.
Heat Extractor Technology can be used behind the PV panels or in a glazed format on their own to create liquid temperatures to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
Oxyhydrogen gas is classified as a renewable energy source, with water vapor as its main byproduct when burned, therefore does not produce carbon emissions.

catalysts.event: USPTO issued patent number 12149091 for Energy Management System
catalysts.sentence: On November 19, 2024 the USPTO notified the Company that patent number 12149091 was issued.

catalysts.event: USPTO issued patent number 12224704 for Heat Extractor
catalysts.sentence: The United States Patent Trademark Office (USPTO) has notified the Company that patent number 12224704 was issued on February 11, 2025.

catalysts.event: USPTO issued patent number 12231085 for Water Producing System (Enertopia Rainmaker)
catalysts.sentence: On February 18, 2025 the United States Patent Trademark Office (USPTO) notified the Company that patent number 12231085 (Water Producing System for a Liquid Transfer Mat) was issued.

catalysts.event: Filed provisional patent for Scalable Automated Oxyhydrogen Production, Storage, and Utilization System
catalysts.sentence: On April 4, 2025, the Company announced the filing of provisional patent number 63/782/745 for the Scalable Automated Oxyhydrogen Production, Storage, and Utilization System for on grid or off grid applications.

catalysts.event: Started building mobile lab testing and proving facility for Oxyhydrogen technology
catalysts.sentence: On May 29, 2025, the Company announced the start of building of a mobile lab testing and proving facility for our Oxyhydrogen technology that will also allow real-time demonstrations of a fully automated oxyhydrogen production and replacement system, which can then be used to run a wide variety of propane appliances, generate hot water and air, or for use as an air conditioning unit.
The Company's 1 for 20 share consolidation became effective January 10, 2025.
